problem: (scanLine) Missing test for triple-quote inside single-line string of the same quote type
fix: Add test with `"text """` or `'text '''` to ensure same-quote triple-quote does not flip state
evidence: `if q != 0` at line 193 guards against triple-quote detection; `TestHost_PyParseTripleQuoteInsideString` only tests `"` with `'''`, not `"` with `"""`
